creator: devnexen@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 158529
Should be under net main category

This is a C library from DeviceAtlas which provides device detection.
More information can be found here (https://deviceatlas.com/resources/enterprise-apis).

There is no direct upload of the source code but instead the user can register here and place it in ${DISTDIR} folder in a same way, more or less, that Java VM from Oracle from example.

Kindest regards.
